title: Type hierarchy section in filter sidebar
description:
Add a new Type section to the filter sidebar positioned between the Projects section and the Scope/Source section. It allows users to filter by issue type independently of the toolbar type selector. The options shown respect the Show Initiatives configuration setting.

Scenario: Type hierarchy section appears in filter sidebar

Given the filter sidebar is open
Then a Type section is visible between the Projects section and the Scope section
And the section shows selectable options for the visible issue types

Scenario: All three types shown when Show Initiatives is on

Given the Show Initiatives setting is on
When the user opens the filter sidebar
Then the Type section shows three options: Initiatives, Epics, and Issues

Scenario: Only two types shown when Show Initiatives is off

Given the Show Initiatives setting is off
When the user opens the filter sidebar
Then the Type section shows two options: Epics and Issues
And no Initiatives option appears

Scenario: Selecting a type in the sidebar filters the board

Given the filter sidebar is open and no type is selected in the Type section
When the user clicks Epics in the Type section
Then the kanban board filters to show only epics
And the Epics option appears selected in the sidebar Type section

Scenario: Selecting the same type again deselects it

Given the user has Epics selected in the sidebar Type section
When the user clicks Epics again
Then no type is selected (deselected state)
And the board shows all issue types (subject to other active filters)

Scenario: Sidebar type selection and toolbar type selector share the same filter state

Given the toolbar type selector has Issues selected
When the user opens the filter sidebar
Then Issues appears selected in the sidebar Type section

Given the user changes the selection in the sidebar Type section to Epics
Then the toolbar type selector also updates to show Epics selected
And both controls reflect the same filter state

Scenario: Type section state persists across page reload

Given the user has selected Epics in the sidebar type section
When the page is reloaded
Then Epics remains selected in the type section
And the board continues to filter by epics
